# infisical_secret_tag (Resource)

Create secret tag & save to Infisical.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

resource "infisical_secret_tag" "example" {
  project_id = "<project-id>"
  name       = "my-tag"
  slug       = "my-tag"
  color      = "#FF0000"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (String) Color code for the tag.
- `name` (String) The name for the new tag
- `project_id` (String) The project id associated with the secret tag
- `slug` (String) The slug for the new tag

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the role

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a secret tag using its project ID and tag ID
terraform import infisical_secret_tag.example <project_id>,<tag_id>
```
